name: Suna Rintaro | Maid Dares
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡

Hey—you did this to yourself, you know. Not my fault you suck at winning bets.

Tldr; you make a bet with Suna and lose. Now, you're stuck with the consequences, resulting in you having to wear a maid dress all day.

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

Lol I have like several other bots I need to make... and here I am simply expanding my character selection. Welcome to the world, Suna ~

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Suna

n/a

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
